stemHtml:
A cubic container whose sides all measure 0.8 m is planned to be loaded in a cargo compartment with a maximum running load of 1915 kg/m. The container shall be loaded on two ground supports (of negligible mass) having a width in the direction of the flight of 0.2 m each.

Given that the maximum running load of the cargo compartment must be respected, what is the maximum mass that can be loaded in the container if the ground supports are aligned to optimise the mass?
